title: PM Org ORM Alignment Draft Packet History Demotion Execution
objective: Normalize the remaining live-looking 2026-04-14 PM org ORM-alignment packet-definition singleton so that file no longer presents itself as a still-live PM org ORM-alignment packet after standalone repo cutover and instead acts as historical packet provenance with an explicit current-routing redirect.
dependency_note: After Packet 230 closed the adjacent `pm-schema-011d` singleton, the nearest remaining current-looking residue in the PM domain draft lane is the successor `pm-schema-011e` org ORM-alignment singleton. Its surrounding packet-history now serves only as provenance, so the packet-definition JSON itself is the strongest adjacent live-looking residue.
execution_scope: Retitle the `pm-schema-011e` packet-definition singleton as historical provenance.
Add explicit `historical_note` and `current_routing` fields to the packet JSON.
Preserve the original packet body below those top-entry routing fields without reopening ORM alignment, runtime, or implementation scope.
forbidden_scope: broad packet-archive rewriting beyond top-entry demotion and routing normalization
success_criteria: The `pm-schema-011e` packet-definition singleton now reads as historical provenance instead of a live PM org ORM-alignment packet.
The file explicitly routes current readers to `PROJECT_STATUS.md` and the closeout inventory.
Repo-owned status routing records the closure and leaves no ambiguity about the next remaining adjacent residue check.
next_action: Close the adjacent `pm-schema-011f` singleton so the next remaining PM-domain residue is explicit after the `pm-schema-011e` closure.
